mapper.select: /* DisplayCategoryQueryMyBatisDao.getCategoryDetail */ SELECT PDCB.DISP_CTG_NO , PDCBM.DISP_CTG_NM , PDCB.SITE_NO , CSB.SITE_NM , PDCB.DPML_NO , PDCB.DISP_SEQ , PDCB.USE_YN , PDCB.LEAF_YN , PDCB.YES24_CTG_CD , CASE WHEN PDCB.DISP_CTG_NO IN (SELECT PDCB1.UPR_DISP_CTG_NO FROM PR_DISP_CTG_BASE PDCB1) THEN 'N' WHEN (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM PR_STD_CTG_DISP_INFO PSCDI WHERE PSCDI.DISP_CTG_NO = #{dispCtgNo} AND PSCDI.DEL_YN = 'N') > 0 THEN 'N' WHEN (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM PR_DISP_GOODS_INFO PDGI WHERE PDGI.DISP_CTG_NO = PDCB.DISP_CTG_NO) > 0 THEN 'N' WHEN COALESCE(PDCB.THN_CTG_NO, '') != '' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS LEAF_CTG_YN_CHANGE_POSSIBLE , PDCB.SYS_MOD_ID , PDCB.SYS_MOD_DTM FROM PR_DISP_CTG_BASE PDCB INNER JOIN PR_DISP_CTG_BASE_ML PDCBM ON PDCB.DISP_CTG_NO = PDCBM.DISP_CTG_NO AND PDCBM.LANG_CD = #{langCd} INNER JOIN CC_SITE_BASE CSB ON CSB.SITE_NO = PDCB.SITE_NO WHERE PDCB.DISP_CTG_NO = #{dispCtgNo}

/* DisplayCategoryQueryMyBatisDao.getSubCategoryList */ SELECT PDCB.DISP_CTG_NO , PDCBM.DISP_CTG_NM , PDCB.DPML_NO , PDCB.DISP_SEQ , PDCB.USE_YN , PDCB.LEAF_YN , PDCB.SYS_MOD_ID , PDCB.SYS_MOD_DTM FROM PR_DISP_CTG_BASE PDCB INNER JOIN PR_DISP_CTG_BASE_ML PDCBM ON PDCB.DISP_CTG_NO = PDCBM.DISP_CTG_NO AND PDCBM.LANG_CD = #{langCd} WHERE PDCB.UPR_DISP_CTG_NO = #{dispCtgNo} ORDER BY PDCB.DISP_SEQ, PDCB.SYS_MOD_DTM DESC

/* DisplayCategoryQueryMyBatisDao.getCheckValidGoods */ SELECT CASE WHEN NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM PR_GOODS_BASE WHERE GOODS_NO = #{goodsNo}) THEN 'N' WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM PR_DISP_GOODS_INFO WHERE DISP_CTG_NO = #{dispCtgNo} AND GOODS_NO = #{goodsNo}) THEN 'D' ELSE 'Y' END AS VALID_YN
/* DisplayCategoryQueryMyBatisDao.getSiteList */ SELECT SITE_NO as "siteNo", SITE_NM as "siteNm" FROM CC_SITE_BASE ORDER BY SITE_NO
